AquaFunded 45% OFF Valentine Deal

AquaFunded is offering a special Valentine's season promotion with 45% OFF all forex trading challenges. Use code VALENTINE at checkout to immediately reduce your challenge fee and pair it with an extraordinary 150% fee refund on your very first payout — making this one of the highest-value seasonal deals available in the prop trading space right now.

AquaFunded is a forex-focused proprietary trading firm known for its high-definition trading environment and competitive profit-sharing structure. The firm caters to traders who want professional execution quality, robust platform support, and a straightforward path from challenge to funded status.

With code VALENTINE, you unlock a 45% discount across all challenge tiers — from the entry-level Sea Horse accounts up to the flagship Whale account. On top of the discount, AquaFunded's 150% profit refund policy means you get back more than your original fee on your first payout, effectively making the challenge risk-free once you pass and receive your first disbursement.

AquaFunded's challenge structure features clearly defined profit targets and drawdown limits, with no hidden restrictions. The firm supports multiple trading platforms and offers a competitive profit split. The combination of the Valentine discount and the 150% refund policy makes this deal particularly attractive for traders looking to maximize their return on evaluation cost.

To claim this offer, click the affiliate link above to visit AquaFunded, choose your preferred challenge size, and apply code VALENTINE at checkout. The 45% discount will be reflected immediately. The 150% fee refund will be applied automatically on your first successful payout after becoming funded.
